home.heroTagline: “Nothing you have done so far defines who you Are”
home.processLine1: Sanación en Luz comes to us for the Age of Light.
home.processLine2: Sanación en Luz is a process designed for evolution into the New Human.
home.processLine3: Sanación en Luz is the path to your original Purity.
home.facilitatorsText: We are Darío and Mónica. Sanación en Luz began to arrive to us in August 2020. They showed us that we were Divine Complements, and that at this time it is necessary that we receive their guidance for the next process: Sanacion en Luz.

testimonialsItems.text: When I started doing the process of Sanación en Luz my life changed completely. I feel happy, with a lot of peace, in harmony and above all I managed to unblock what had me stagnant.
testimonialsItems.author: Miriam (Argentina)

testimonialsItems.text: Darío and Mónica accompany from pure Love and a deep respect for the individual process. Finding them was a before and after in my life.
testimonialsItems.author: Laura (España)

testimonialsItems.text: The Quietude workshop is an experience that cannot be explained in words. It is a return home, a return to the center.
testimonialsItems.author: Carlos (México)

home.ctaText: Start your process towards the New Human today.
